Klasse QRCodeUtils

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.QRCodeUtils
public class QRCodeUtils extends Object
Utility class for QR code operations: generation, retrieval, and parsing.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    QRCodeUtils()
     

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static void
    clearStoredQRCodes()
    Deletes the local scans.json file containing stored QR codes.
    static List<File>
    createQrCodes(List<Article> articles)
    Generates QR code images for a list of articles.
    static List<String>
    getDataFromQRCode()
    Reads all QR code data strings from the local scans.json file.
    static String
    getLatestQRCodeData()
    Gets the latest QR code data string from the local scans.json file.
    static List<Map<String,String>>
    getListMapFromJsonQRCode()
    Reads all QR code JSON objects as maps from the local scans.json file.
    static String[]
    getPartsFromData(String data)
    Splits a QR code data string into its parts using ';' as separator.
    static List<String>
    getQRCodes()
    Reads all QR code JSON objects as strings from the local scans.json file.
    static List<Map<String,Object>>
    retrieveQrCodeDataFromWebsite()
    Retrieves QR code scan data from the remote website as a list of maps.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • QRCodeUtils

      public QRCodeUtils()

  • Methodendetails

    • createQrCodes

      public static List<File> createQrCodes(List<Article> articles)
      Generates QR code images for a list of articles. Each QR code encodes a URL with the article's QR data.
      Parameter:
      articles - List of Article objects
      Gibt zurück:
      List of generated QR code image files

    • retrieveQrCodeDataFromWebsite

      public static List<Map<String,Object>> retrieveQrCodeDataFromWebsite()
      Retrieves QR code scan data from the remote website as a list of maps.
      Gibt zurück:
      List of maps representing QR code scan data

    • getDataFromQRCode

      public static List<String> getDataFromQRCode()
      Reads all QR code data strings from the local scans.json file.
      Gibt zurück:
      List of QR code data strings

    • getQRCodes

      public static List<String> getQRCodes()
      Reads all QR code JSON objects as strings from the local scans.json file.
      Gibt zurück:
      List of QR code JSON strings

    • getLatestQRCodeData

      public static String getLatestQRCodeData()
      Gets the latest QR code data string from the local scans.json file.
      Gibt zurück:
      Latest QR code data string, or null if not found

    • getPartsFromData

      public static String[] getPartsFromData(String data)
      Splits a QR code data string into its parts using ';' as separator.
      Parameter:
      data - QR code data string
      Gibt zurück:
      Array of parts

    • getListMapFromJsonQRCode

      public static List<Map<String,String>> getListMapFromJsonQRCode()
      Reads all QR code JSON objects as maps from the local scans.json file.
      Gibt zurück:
      List of maps representing QR code data

    • clearStoredQRCodes

      public static void clearStoredQRCodes()
      Deletes the local scans.json file containing stored QR codes.
